claim_boundary: Compares software gating/accounting modes over existing artifacts; not new QPU evidence. Quality fields are intentionally split to avoid comparing raw target fidelity against governed software scores.

full_aegis.quality_note: Do not compare raw_target_quality_mean to governed_quality_score_mean as one metric. Raw target quality is measured from GHZ/count data; governed quality is a stricter software score over accepted artifacts.
